summary.audit_decision: Do not run live AWS resources until aws_identity_ok=yes; when opened, run forwarding echo first and keep active migration as phase 2.

fail_closed.name: identity_checker
fail_closed.meaning: AWS identity is checked before live resource creation.

fail_closed.name: identity_ok_gate
fail_closed.meaning: Invalid credentials stop the runner before AWS resources are created.

fail_closed.name: readiness_exit_gate
fail_closed.meaning: Non-zero readiness checker exit is fail-closed.

fail_closed.name: blocked_result_writer
fail_closed.meaning: Blocked runs write a public-safe result artifact.

fail_closed.name: require_live_switch
fail_closed.meaning: Operators can force blocked readiness to fail CI/local scripts when desired.

resources.name: key_pair
resources.meaning: Temporary SSH key pair for target bootstrap.

cleanup.name: trap_cleanup
cleanup.meaning: Cleanup runs on normal exit and most shell errors.

cleanup.name: collect_targets
cleanup.meaning: Target artifacts are collected before teardown when possible.

risk_boundaries.name: keep_resources_override
risk_boundaries.meaning: If set, cleanup can be intentionally skipped for debugging.

risk_boundaries.name: client_public_cidr
risk_boundaries.meaning: SSH/UDP exposure is constrained to the operator public CIDR and VPC CIDR.

risk_boundaries.name: tag_run_id
risk_boundaries.meaning: Resources are tagged with RunId for cleanup/forensics.

risk_boundaries.name: claim_boundary
risk_boundaries.meaning: The live runner only claims forwarding echo, not active migration.

claim_boundary.safe_claim: The live runner has explicit pre-resource AWS identity gating, an inventoried temporary resource set, and cleanup coverage for listener, NLB, target group, instances, security group, key pair, and local key material.
claim_boundary.unsafe_claim: This safety audit proves live AWS forwarding, active Connection Migration, absence of cloud cost, or cleanup success under all possible process-kill/cloud-failure modes.
claim_boundary.next_step: After credential refresh, run the live forwarding echo with default cleanup, then inspect result.env and summary.json before designing any active path-change variant.
